outline.text: While cooking and on the morning walk
outline.title: While cooking and on the morning walk
Hidden Brain
outline.description: Behavior, habits, and why people do what they do. The Sunday meal-prep regular.

outline.title: The Daily
outline.description: One news story a morning. Only when the news is survivable that day.

outline.title: Casework Chronicles
outline.description: Process and practice discussions only. Never while too tired to argue with it.

outline.title: The Practice Room
outline.description: Independent studio owners on leases, pricing, and keeping the lights on.

outline.title: Show Up Daily
outline.description: Short discipline-and-habit episodes. Pairs with the choreography notebook.

outline.title: Families in Focus
outline.description: Reunification outcomes and trauma-informed family work. Skimmed for the January renewal reading.
